//1: Copy to PIM-WarningOverrides.custom.json (gitignored). Each entry DOWNGRADES
//2: matched warnings to 'acknowledged' (kept + annotated, NOT dropped -- auditable).
//3: Only warnings/infos can be acknowledged; errors are hard gates and never suppressed.
//4: Contract: code REQUIRED; reason REQUIRED; expiresOn REQUIRED unless noExpiry:true
//5: (exemptions model -- never indefinite by default). Expired overrides STOP suppressing:
//6: the finding resurfaces as an active warning. scope keys AND together; omit scope to
//7: cover every finding of that code. pattern is a wildcard over subject|target|message.
//8: A future GUI 'Overrule' button on the Validate tab writes this same shape.

overrides.reason: PAW high-priv admin is intentionally reachable via both the GlobalRoles bundle and the OperationSecurity role group; reviewed by IT Security.
All PAW-segment admins share the standard multi-path bundle layout; accepted as designed for the PAW maturity ring.
Break-glass account intentionally has no PIM assignment rows; it is directly role-eligible outside the group model.
